name: Island Barbecue Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
Serves: 6
Mix the barbecue sauce, juice, garlic, vanilla and allspice. Heat electric broiler (not necessary to preheat gas broiler). Place chops on greased rack of broiler pan. Broil 3-4 inches from heat for 10 to 12 minutes on each side or until done, brushing frequently with barbecue sauce.
